payload.answer: Captured as an update: Sam no longer works at Goldman and now works at Point72.
citations: New input: '/brain remember Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.'

details: Accepted the new employment update as durable memory.

raw_text: {"intent":"remember","decision":"accept_with_update","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former_employer"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current_employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"formerly_worked_at","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Point72"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"link_to_existing","entity_id":null,"reason":"The new statement refers to the same person and updates the existing employer information."},"conflict_classification":"superseding_update","answer":"Captured as an update: Sam no longer works at Goldman and now works at Point72.","citations":["Existing context: 'Sam works at Goldman.'","New input: '/brain remember Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.'"],"repair_options":["Mark the prior 'Sam works at Goldman' memory as superseded.","If multiple people named Sam exist, split into separate entities before saving."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Accepted the new employment update as durable memory.","Classified the prior Goldman employment fact as no longer current.","Stored Point72 as Sam's current employer."]}}
